text:
A number N satisfies all of the following conditions:
• N is a common multiple of 6 and 8
• N is a factor of 720
• When N is divided by 5, the remainder is 4
• N is greater than 100

What is N?
generatorSolution:
Step 1: Find the LCM of 6 and 8. LCM(6,8) = 24. So N must be a multiple of 24.

Step 2: Find which multiples of 24 are factors of 720. 720 ÷ 24 = 30, so the multiples of 24 that are factors of 720 are: 24, 48, 72, 96, 120, 144, 240, 360, 720. We check each: 24×1=24 ✓, 24×2=48 ✓, 24×3=72 ✓, 24×4=96 ✓, 24×5=120 ✓, 24×6=144 ✓, 24×10=240 ✓, 24×15=360 ✓, 24×30=720 ✓.

Step 3: N must be greater than 100, so candidates are: 120, 144, 240, 360, 720.

Step 4: Check which gives remainder 4 when divided by 5.
• 120 ÷ 5 = 24 remainder 0 ✗
• 144 ÷ 5 = 28 remainder 4 ✓
• 240 ÷ 5 = 48 remainder 0 ✗
• 360 ÷ 5 = 72 remainder 0 ✗
• 720 ÷ 5 = 144 remainder 0 ✗

Only 144 satisfies all four conditions, so N = 144.
